sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 166 of 2015 ITRA 167 of 2015 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 19.12.2025 Mr. Faheem Ali Memon, advocate for the applicant. These reference applications are pending since 2015. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Per learned counsel, the impugned order pertains to remand orders. Under such circumstances, these reference applications `may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
